name: Disable Last Access Time
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: NtfsDisableLastAccessUpdate controls whether NTFS updates the LastAccessTime timestamp on files when they are read.
forensic_value: Anti-forensic indicator — NtfsDisableLastAccessUpdate=1 means file access times are NOT updated, significantly reducing forensic timeline reconstruction fidelity. On Windows 10 1803+ this is disabled by default for performance; manually set value of 1 on earlier systems indicates deliberate anti-forensic configuration.
